commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Aaron shall offer the Levites before the LORD for an offering of the children of Israel, that they may execute the service of the LORD. Hebrew, "he shall heave them as a heave-offering before the Lord. "Some assert, that Aaron lifted each of them towards the four quarters of the world; (ver. 21,) or he made them go up towards the altar, and on each side. This ceremony was performed whenever a Levite was taken into the ministry, 2 Paralipomenon xxix.
